seoTitle: Glen Davis vs Glen Elgin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glen Davis and Glen Elgin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glen Davis vs Glen Elgin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Davis and Glen Elgin.
heading: Glen Davis vs Glen Elgin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Davis, New South Wales and Glen Elgin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Davis has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Glen Elgin (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Davis or Glen Elgin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Davis has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Glen Elgin scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Davis scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Elgin scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Davis or Glen Elgin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Davis has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
